title: Swede Panzanella Bites
description: A keto take on the classic Italian bread salad, in a bite-sized form using swede and pleasantly seasoned ingredients.
instructions: 2. Cut the swede into 1-inch cubes and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, crumble the mozzarella cheese into a bowl.
4. Add the roasted swede to the bowl with the mozzarella cheese.
5. Sprinkle Italian seasonings over the top.
6. Drizzle with balsamic vinegar and toss to combine.
7. Garnish with fresh parsley and season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature.
